nodes.label: AI as inspiration source for creative ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as complete idea generator replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I took inspiration from 3 of the ideas it came up with and adapted them into my own offering

nodes.label: AI as business and marketing tool
nodes.grounding_span: I have found it really helpful with social media tips and content ideas to generate passive income

nodes.label: AI in therapeutic context
nodes.grounding_span: AI can essentially become an online counsellor, which I don't believe it is nearly ready for

nodes.label: Human creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I want them to come from my own creative thought process

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: Humans are innately creative and have used art to communicate since the beginning of time

nodes.label: Critical thinking and communication skills
nodes.grounding_span: leads to a break down of critical thinking skills, and communication skills

nodes.label: Therapeutic safety and responsibility
nodes.grounding_span: AI can essentially become an online counsellor, which I don't believe it is nearly ready for

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as inspiration
nodes.grounding_span: I found it actually very helpful and was impressed by the ideas

nodes.label: Hesitation toward AI for creative ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I admit I feel hesitant when using AI for creative ideas

nodes.label: Concern about AI in therapeutic role
nodes.grounding_span: AI can essentially become an online counsellor, which I don't believe it is nearly ready for

nodes.label: Fear of AI replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I am concerned that AI will take over the creative thinking process for humans

nodes.label: Resolve to maintain current AI use boundaries
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to use AI strictly for inspiration or refinement of my own ideas

nodes.label: Adaptive integration — combines AI ideas with own existing concepts
nodes.grounding_span: I took another idea I had previously and combined it with the AI one

nodes.label: Boundary setting — maintains clear separation between AI use domains
nodes.grounding_span: I do not use AI for my actual art prompts
